element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Basic offensive tool for entire game
Signature mechanic; becomes primary traversal method
Progression gate (8-12 gems per level depending on difficulty)
Post-gem collection objective; meet Bagheera, Baloo, King Louie, Kaa
Projectile-only damage model; pattern recognition required
Advanced weapon; returns after hitting target
Narrative climax; ultimate threat requiring mastery of all mechanics

typical_relief_triggers: Finding friendly NPC character after gem collection
typical_tension_triggers: Platforming difficulty sections requiring precise vine swinging
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Moderate intensity with cyclical boss tension every other level; time-gated progression creates sustained pressure throughout each stage

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Gems hidden throughout level (collection quota creates exploration incentive)

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introduction of basic jumping, climbing, and banana projectile; gem collection quota at minimum (8 gems on easy mode)
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Vine swinging becomes dominant navigation mechanic; powerup weapon variants introduced; boss encounters establish pattern-based combat
difficulty_curve.late_game: Integration of all mechanics; boomerang banana and advanced powerups; Shere Khan represents comprehensive skill test
notable_spikes: Boss encounters every other level (pattern-learning threshold)
Transition to vine-swinging dominance (motor control spike)
Final Shere Khan encounter (comprehensive mechanic mastery required)

notable_level_patterns.pattern_name: Gem Collection > NPC Encounter > Level Exit
notable_level_patterns.description: Standard level loop: collect required number of gems (8/10/12 based on difficulty), locate friendly character (Bagheera, Baloo, King Louie, or Kaa), exit through character interaction
Every other level features boss encounter instead of friendly NPC. Boss requires projectile-based combat only; jumping on boss causes no damage
Dedicated sections requiring sequential vine swinging across platforming gaps; becomes signature navigation challenge in mid-to-late game
All levels operate under 6-minute completion window, creating sustained tension across chapter structure
